info.summary: Runtime foundation for CivicClerk municipal meeting workflows.
info.title: CivicClerk

get.description: Describe what the runtime foundation currently provides.
Describe CC-7 runtime coverage and staff-auth configuration posture.

schema.title: Response Admin Config Admin Config Get

get.description: List prompt-library definitions and public approval gates for admins.

schema.title: Response Admin Prompts Admin Prompts Get

get.description: List department-submitted agenda intake items awaiting staff review.

schema.title: Response List Agenda Intake Items Agenda Intake Get

post.description: Submit a department agenda item into the database-backed staff queue.

schema.title: Response Submit Agenda Intake Item Agenda Intake Post

post.description: Promote a clerk-ready intake item into the canonical agenda lifecycle.

schema.title: Response Promote Agenda Intake Item Agenda Intake  Item Id  Promote Post

post.description: Record clerk readiness review for an intake queue item.

schema.title: Response Review Agenda Intake Item Agenda Intake  Item Id  Review Post

post.description: Create a draft agenda item for lifecycle enforcement.

schema.title: Response Create Agenda Item Agenda Items Post

get.description: Return the current agenda item state.

schema.title: Response Get Agenda Item Agenda Items  Item Id  Get

get.description: Return lifecycle audit entries for an agenda item.

schema.title: Response Get Agenda Item Audit Agenda Items  Item Id  Audit Get

post.description: Apply a canonical agenda item lifecycle transition.

schema.title: Response Transition Agenda Item Agenda Items  Item Id  Transitions Post

get.description: Return an empty public favicon response so browser QA stays console-clean.
Provide a simple operational health check for IT staff.

post.description: Import a local connector export payload without outbound network calls.

schema.title: Response Import Connector Meeting Imports  Connector Name  Meetings Post

get.description: List municipal meeting bodies for staff setup and scheduling clients.

schema.title: Response List Meeting Bodies Meeting Bodies Get

post.description: Create a municipal meeting body for staff calendar workflows.

schema.title: Response Create Meeting Body Meeting Bodies Post

delete.description: Deactivate a meeting body instead of hard-deleting legal history.

schema.title: Response Deactivate Meeting Body Meeting Bodies  Body Id  Delete

get.description: Return one municipal meeting body.

schema.title: Response Get Meeting Body Meeting Bodies  Body Id  Get

patch.description: Update a municipal meeting body without losing its record identity.

schema.title: Response Update Meeting Body Meeting Bodies  Body Id  Patch

get.description: List meetings for staff calendar and dashboard clients.

post.description: Create a scheduled meeting for lifecycle enforcement.

get.description: Return the current meeting state.

schema.title: Response Get Meeting Meetings  Meeting Id  Get

patch.description: Edit staff scheduling fields before the public meeting is locked.

schema.title: Response Update Meeting Schedule Meetings  Meeting Id  Patch

get.description: List action items linked to a meeting.

schema.title: Response List Action Items Meetings  Meeting Id  Action Items Get

post.description: Create an action item linked to a meeting outcome.

schema.title: Response Create Action Item Meetings  Meeting Id  Action Items Post

get.description: Return lifecycle audit entries for a meeting.

schema.title: Response Get Meeting Audit Meetings  Meeting Id  Audit Get

post.description: Create a records-ready packet export bundle with manifest, checksums, and audit.

schema.title: Response Create Packet Export Bundle Meetings  Meeting Id  Export Bundle Post

get.description: List citation-gated minutes drafts for a meeting.

schema.title: Response List Minutes Drafts Meetings  Meeting Id  Minutes Drafts Get

post.description: Create an AI-assisted minutes draft only when every sentence is cited.

schema.title: Response Create Minutes Draft Meetings  Meeting Id  Minutes Drafts Post

get.description: List captured motions and correction records for a meeting.

schema.title: Response List Motions Meetings  Meeting Id  Motions Get

post.description: Capture an immutable motion for a meeting.

schema.title: Response Capture Motion Meetings  Meeting Id  Motions Post

get.description: List persisted notice checklist records for a meeting.

schema.title: Response List Notice Checklist Records Meetings  Meeting Id  Notice Checklists Get

post.description: Persist a notice compliance checklist record for staff review.

schema.title: Response Create Notice Checklist Record Meetings  Meeting Id  Notice Checklists Post

post.description: Check public notice compliance without posting.

schema.title: Response Check Notice Compliance Meetings  Meeting Id  Notices Check Post

post.description: Post a public notice after deadline and human-approval checks pass.

schema.title: Response Post Notice Meetings  Meeting Id  Notices Post Post

get.description: List ordinance and resolution handoffs for a meeting.

schema.title: Response List Ordinance Resolution Handoffs Meetings  Meeting Id  Ordinance Resolution Handoff Get

post.description: Create a code-drafting handoff from adopted meeting action.

schema.title: Response Create Ordinance Resolution Handoff Meetings  Meeting Id  Ordinance Resolution Handoff Post

get.description: List persisted packet assembly records for a meeting.

schema.title: Response List Packet Assembly Records Meetings  Meeting Id  Packet Assemblies Get

post.description: Create a persisted packet assembly record tied to a packet snapshot.

schema.title: Response Create Packet Assembly Record Meetings  Meeting Id  Packet Assemblies Post

get.description: Return packet snapshot versions for a meeting.

schema.title: Response List Packet Snapshots Meetings  Meeting Id  Packet Snapshots Get

post.description: Create an immutable packet snapshot version for a meeting.

schema.title: Response Create Packet Snapshot Meetings  Meeting Id  Packet Snapshots Post

post.description: Create a public or restricted archive record for a meeting.

schema.title: Response Publish Public Record Meetings  Meeting Id  Public Record Post

get.description: List staff report records linked to a meeting.

schema.title: Response List Staff Reports Meetings  Meeting Id  Staff Reports Get

post.description: Normalize a staff report into the clerk-visible agenda intake trail.

schema.title: Response Create Staff Report Meetings  Meeting Id  Staff Reports Post

get.description: List transcript records queued for a meeting.

schema.title: Response List Transcript Records Meetings  Meeting Id  Transcripts Get

post.description: Capture transcript material for clerk review before public release.

schema.title: Response Create Transcript Record Meetings  Meeting Id  Transcripts Post

post.description: Apply a canonical meeting lifecycle transition.

schema.title: Response Transition Meeting Meetings  Meeting Id  Transitions Post

post.description: Reject automatic public posting of AI-drafted minutes.

patch.description: Reject edits to captured motions; corrections must be append-only.

put.description: Reject edits to captured motions; corrections must be append-only.

post.description: Create an append-only correction record for a captured motion.

schema.title: Response Correct Motion Motions  Motion Id  Corrections Post

get.description: List captured votes and correction records for a motion.

schema.title: Response List Votes Motions  Motion Id  Votes Get

post.description: Capture an immutable vote for a motion.

schema.title: Response Capture Vote Motions  Motion Id  Votes Post

post.description: Attach posting proof metadata to a persisted notice checklist record.

schema.title: Response Attach Notice Posting Proof Notice Checklists  Record Id  Posting Proof Post

post.description: Finalize a persisted packet assembly record.

schema.title: Response Finalize Packet Assembly Record Packet Assemblies  Record Id  Finalize Post

get.description: Render the resident-facing public portal shell.
List resident comments awaiting staff review across public records.

schema.title: Response List Public Comment Review Queue Public Comments Review Queue Get

get.description: Search public archives with permission-aware closed-session filtering.

schema.title: Response Public Archive Search Public Archive Search Get

get.description: Return public meeting calendar records only.

schema.title: Response Public Meetings Public Meetings Get

get.description: Return one public meeting record without revealing restricted records.

schema.title: Response Public Meeting Detail Public Meetings  Record Id  Get

get.description: List resident comments collected for a public record.

schema.title: Response List Public Comments Public Meetings  Record Id  Comments Get

post.description: Accept a resident comment only for public records with comment intake enabled.

schema.title: Response Submit Public Comment Public Meetings  Record Id  Comments Post

get.description: Download one public-safe agenda, packet, or adopted-minutes text file.
Render the staff-facing workflow foundation.
Report whether the current staff auth mode is configured for safe use.

schema.title: Response Staff Auth Readiness Staff Auth Readiness Get

get.description: Start the municipal OIDC browser sign-in flow for staff users.
Clear the local CivicClerk staff browser session.
Complete the OIDC authorization-code callback and issue a staff session cookie.
Describe the current staff access mode for the browser workflow shell.

schema.title: Response Staff Session Staff Session Get

get.description: List persisted vendor live-sync source health without contacting vendors.

schema.title: Response List Vendor Live Sync Sources Vendor Live Sync Sources Get

post.description: Create a durable vendor live-sync source record without contacting the vendor.

schema.title: Response Create Vendor Live Sync Source Vendor Live Sync Sources Post

post.description: Clear or move a vendor delta cursor without contacting the vendor network.

schema.title: Response Reset Vendor Live Sync Cursor Vendor Live Sync Sources  Source Id  Cursor Reset Post

get.description: Return persisted run history for one vendor source without contacting vendors.

schema.title: Response List Vendor Live Sync Runs Vendor Live Sync Sources  Source Id  Run Log Get

post.description: Record one vendor sync run outcome without starting a vendor pull.

schema.title: Response Record Vendor Live Sync Run Vendor Live Sync Sources  Source Id  Run Log Post

put.description: Reject edits to captured votes; corrections must be append-only.
